race.description: Tle Thanks Energetic Lighting Maiden Plate
race.comment: COULTER (4) resumed with a narrow defeat at Hawkesbury over 1300m after being prominent at the turn. Has switched yards and is still shy of his debut number. Strips fitter and is using the low barrier is perfectly placed to break through. AMARILLO SKY (2) was beaten 3 lengths, when resuming from a spell in the same contest. He also has more to give and poses a threat. ZOUGOTME (11) missed a whisker at Hawkesbury and then again here over this distance when he had to do some work going forward. He can make the finish again. OL' MATE COOP (9) missed a whisker in the same contest and is busting to win. Maps well and will get every chance. MASTER ARON (7) will find this easier than Rosehill. He'd improved at Wyong prior and peaks today with the blinkers applied for the first time. Finally draws a low gate and has a handy 2kg claim.
